fields.name: founder_name
fields.description: full name of the founder, owner, co-founder, principal, or CEO of this business, if the page states it

fields.name: founder_title
fields.description: that person's exact title (Founder, Owner, CEO, Co-Founder, etc.)

fields.name: company_instagram
fields.description: the company's Instagram profile URL if linked on the page

fields.name: company_linkedin
fields.description: the company's LinkedIn URL (company page or personal) if linked

fields.name: company_facebook
fields.description: the company's Facebook page URL if linked

fields.name: founder_instagram
fields.description: the founder's personal Instagram URL if linked

fields.name: founder_linkedin
fields.description: the founder's personal LinkedIn profile URL (linkedin.com/in/...) if linked

fields.name: founder_facebook
fields.description: the founder's personal Facebook URL if linked
